{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221126127CF1BCAACF11B8E775EE"}"},"total":154},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7535010799833350937","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好看，没有超能力加持，真实好看，是普通人的求生之路[赞][赞][赞]","text_exts":[{"e":10,"s":7,"text":"超能力","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B6%85%E8%83%BD%E5%8A%9B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774149972B8E775EE%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227535010799833350937%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227480383978898213912%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B6%85%E8%83%BD%E5%8A%9B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754385836,"group_id":"7480383978898213912","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8jPAfX5v2CsoKbV1Ua/cho=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"104922480040","user_name":"爱吃微波酱黄瓜的龙宇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"104922480040","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7480383978898213912","book_info":{"abstract":"无CP，无空间，无金手指，无爽文，仅有普通人如何在末日环境下艰难求生。
谢灵是电子厂打工仔，大专生，手里有三四万，有驾照，技术不熟练，身材略微壮实，体重有点胖，比瘦弱女生多一些力气。抗压能力较强，突然有一天爆发了丧尸，谢灵不怕死，但是死也要和家人死在一起，于是，她走上了回家的道路••••••","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/496df76c90ec130dd88fe6d645745b42","author":"大闸谢谢","author_id":"","book_id":"7480383978898213912","book_name":"末日爆发，一个普通人的艰难求生","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1040人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7482272413808345662","read_count":"1040","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"370370"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.6","serial_count":"157","tags":"科幻末世,末世,无CP,囤物资","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o539d4438e4ec52703371ef7ba1f18dd9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779333972&x-signature=3T2mz2MMipB5sR%2FN621nvK5ox7A%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"93599558906","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"113"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221126127CF1BCAACF11B8E775EE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":15461,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":34443,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2675},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7542189584212198206","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者还写末世文吗？感觉那种没有丧尸，纯自然灾害类型的末世也很好看。[爱慕][爱慕][爱慕]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756063004,"group_id":"7480383978898213912","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"893235258732919"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7480383978898213912","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"236"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读16小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":15470,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":59336,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7542194615711662910","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看了好多末世题材的小说，写的好的没几本。这个是为数不多的优质末世文，没有乱七八糟的空间系统异能啥的，整体都很真实接地气，好多情节描写的都很到位，看的时候脑子里都有画面了，很好看！值得满分！不懂评分为啥这么低？[什么][什么][什么]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756062678,"group_id":"7480383978898213912","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxQ8ckpn5KRvjfqjnjbf3Jg=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"893235258732919","user_name":"神采奕奕的杜鹃"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"893235258732919","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7480383978898213912","book_info":{"abstract":"无CP，无空间，无金手指，无爽文，仅有普通人如何在末日环境下艰难求生。

k":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7548068869617779480","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的很好看，我看过的末世文也算不少了，这本的视角和主角的出发点都很好，女主刚开始看可能有点圣母，差点弃文，但是转念一想，一个普通的女孩子又怎么能突然一下变得冷漠无情杀伐果断呢。女主的成长线也是一步一步慢慢来的，小女孩也是，几岁的小女孩后面也慢慢变得沉着冷静，但是依旧可爱。文不长，强推！","text_exts":[{"e":86,"s":82,"text":"杀伐果断","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774149972B8E775EE%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227548068869617779480%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227480383978898213912%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757423036,"group_id":"7480383978898213912","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+VPUZ3UPJnB/uKAeu7L7BKPwQ0mCh8Pcgt/t1qPpWq+","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2bd4ba37d80e4f29a2b687ad5efd5a4a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701011&x-signature=ihZlm8cb3U09itiZ69qY0qXqquc%3D","user_id":"3219849708049560","user_name":"是小茯苓呀。"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3219849708049560","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7480383978898213912","book_info":{"abstract":"无CP，无空间，无金手指，无爽文，仅有普通人如何在末日环境下艰难求生。
